run_kind_note: First 5 instances of the validation split per subtask (15 LLM calls total). Pipeline sanity check, not a benchmark result. The `instances_per_subset` hyperparameter (5) and the per-instance `metrics_summary.<domain>.n` (5) make the dry-run nature explicit at the data level.
model_note: Cursor-subagent invocation; model slug is the one accepted by the Task tool. Closest direct mapping is Anthropic claude-sonnet-4 (i.e., the Sonnet 4 family).
runner_note: 15 Cursor subagents (subagent_type=generalPurpose, model=claude-4-sonnet, one per instance) launched in two parallel batches - 5 numerical, then 10 (5 github_prs + 5 poetry). Each subagent was given the path to a per-instance prompt file (committed under prompts/) containing the paper Appendix A default template (system + user) wrapped in a roleplay preamble, and instructed to write its literal model output back. Subagent IDs were session-scoped and are not archived; the response text is preserved as the raw_response field in each outputs_<domain>.jsonl record.

paper.title: AbsenceBench: Language Models Can't Tell What's Missing

validation.shacl_validator_note: Two known shape bugs in tasks/croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl block the paths our files exercise. Bug A (TaskProblemShape spec constraint, malformed outer PropertyShape) hits TaskProblems; Bug B (EvaluationTaskShape evaluatedSolution qualified-cardinality) hits TaskSolutions with EvaluationTask children. Both match items on the team's known-issue list (RISEBench agent analysis, Slack 2026-04-29: 'Change 2' and 'Change 4'). Spec files were NOT modified in this run, per team guidance. See pdf2ct/validation_report.json for structured detail and suggested fixes.

comparison_to_paper_table_3.note: Paper Table 3 reports micro-F1 across the FULL validation split; ours is on n=5 per subset. Comparison shown for orientation only; the n=5 sample is too small to support claims about model improvement vs. claude-3-7-sonnet.

command_line: cursor: 15 Task() invocations of subagent_type=generalPurpose with model=claude-4-sonnet (see runner_note). Equivalent direct-API command for a fresh run on a different machine: `python absencebench_implementation.py --dry-run --model claude-sonnet-4-5` (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).

agent_transcript.note: Lives on the contributor's machine; session-scoped Cursor metadata; not portable. Referenced for audit but not part of this commit. The implementation script + this manifest + the per-instance outputs_*.jsonl + committed prompts/ dir are sufficient for full reproducibility.
